zh.Bolam, Northumberland, England: 英國諾圖波藍德波拉姆
zh.Beckering, Lincolnshire, England: 英國英格蘭林可爾史爾貝可林
zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas de Bekering III於大約1249年出生在英國林可爾史爾貝可林時，他的父親Thomas de Bekering28歲，母親Mary de Cauz24歲。他於大約1277年與Cecilia de Markham結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於大約1285年在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾貝可林享年38歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas de Bekering III于大约1249年出生在英国林可爾史爾貝可林时，他的父亲Thomas de Bekering28岁，母亲Mary de Cauz24岁。他于大约1277年与Cecilia de Markham结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。他去世于大约1285年在英国英格兰林可爾史爾貝可林享年38岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas de Bekering III was born about 1249, in Beckering, Lincolnshire, England, his father, Thomas de Bekering, was 28 and his mother, Mary de Cauz, was 24. He married Cecilia de Markham about 1277. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died about 1285, in Beckering, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 38.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas de Bekering III est né environ 1249, à Beckering, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, son père, Thomas de Bekering, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Mary de Cauz, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Cecilia de Markham environ 1277. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé environ 1285, à Beckering, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 38 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas de Bekering III um 1249 in Beckering, Lincolnshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas de Bekering 28 und seine Mutter Mary de Cauz 24. Er hat um 1277 Cecilia de Markham geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb um 1285 im Alter von 38 Jahren in Beckering, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas de Bekering III è nato il circa 1249 nel Beckering, Lincolnshire, England, il suo padre, Thomas de Bekering, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Mary de Cauz, aveva 24 anni. Lui sposato Cecilia de Markham circa 1277. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì circa 1285, nel Beckering, Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 38 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas de Bekering IIIが約1249年にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアベッカーイングで生まれた時，父Thomas de Bekeringは28歳，母Mary de Cauzは24歳であった。約1277年にCecilia de Markhamと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼は約1285年にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアベッカーイングで38歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas de Bekering III(이)가 대략 1249년 영국 링코실르 벡링에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas de Bekering(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Mary de Cauz(은)는 24세였다. 그는 대략 1277년 Cecilia de Markham(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 대략 1285년 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 벡링에서 38세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas de Bekering III nasceu aproximadamente 1249, em Beckering, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas de Bekering, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Mary de Cauz, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Cecilia de Markham aproximadamente 1277. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1285, em Beckering, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 38 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas de Bekering III родился около 1249 г. в местности беккиринг, линколншир, Англия, его отцу по имени Thomas de Bekering было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Mary de Cauz, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Cecilia de Markham около 1277 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер около 1285 г. в местности беккиринг, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 38 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas de Bekering III nació aproximadamente 1249, en Beckering, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas de Bekering, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Mary de Cauz, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Cecilia de Markham aproximadamente 1277. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió aproximadamente 1285, en Beckering, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 38 años.
